title: Spicy Mediterranean Stir Fry
description: A flavorful stir fry with a spicy kick, blending the best of Mediterranean and Asian flavors. Serve with your favorite sides for a quick and satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Spicy stir-fry sauce (or make your own with chili flakes and olive oil)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of cooking oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the crunchy vegetables and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the spicy stir-fry sauce and stir to coat the vegetables.
Add the parsley and cook for 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
